Name: CutsceneMapIdParam
Description: Determines playback parameters for a cutscene.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Playback Map ID
Fields.Description: A 8-digit map ID. This is the map number used as a reference in the cutscene. If you do not specify the correct map number, the playback position will be shifted.

Fields.Name: Display Requirement: Map ID [1]
Fields.Description: A 8-digit map ID. This parameter is used as a list by the guest to determine whether the cutscene can be played. If not required, leave it 0 or leave it blank.

Fields.Name: Display Requirement: Map ID [2]
Fields.Description: A 8-digit map ID. This parameter is used as a list by the guest to determine whether the cutscene can be played. If not required, leave it 0 or leave it blank.

Fields.Name: Display Requirement: Map ID [3]
Fields.Description: A 8-digit map ID. This parameter is used as a list by the guest to determine whether the cutscene can be played. If not required, leave it 0 or leave it blank.

Fields.Name: Display Requirement: Map ID [4]
Fields.Description: A 8-digit map ID. This parameter is used as a list by the guest to determine whether the cutscene can be played. If not required, leave it 0 or leave it blank.

Fields.Name: Display Requirement: Map ID [5]
Fields.Description: A 8-digit map ID. This parameter is used as a list by the guest to determine whether the cutscene can be played. If not required, leave it 0 or leave it blank.

Fields.Name: Display Requirement: Map ID [6]
Fields.Description: A 8-digit map ID. This parameter is used as a list by the guest to determine whether the cutscene can be played. If not required, leave it 0 or leave it blank.

Fields.Name: Display Requirement: Map ID [7]
Fields.Description: A 8-digit map ID. This parameter is used as a list by the guest to determine whether the cutscene can be played. If not required, leave it 0 or leave it blank.

Fields.Name: Cutscene ID
Fields.Description: Specific a 8 digit cutscene ID.

Fields.Name: Play on Retrigger
Fields.Description: Sets the cutscene to replay on when re-triggered.

Fields.Name: Player State after Cutscene Skip
Fields.Description: Set when you want to specify the state of the player after skipping a cutscene.

Fields.Name: Player State after Cutscene Play
Fields.Description: Set when you want to specify the state of the player after playing the cutscene.

Fields.Name: Is White Fade
Fields.Description: Should the fade-in at the beginning of the cutscene be white instead of black?

Fields.Name: Wait for Map Load after Skip
Fields.Description: Do you want to display the NowLoading screen and wait for loading when skipping? Mainly settings for catapult cutscenes.

Fields.Name: Is Played Continuously in Event
Fields.Description: HUD is displayed momentarily during continuous regeneration, so this is a flag to avoid it.

Fields.Name: Reset Auto-Exposure on Skip
Fields.Description: Resets the tone map gparam settings after a skip.

Fields.Name: Hide In-game Decals
Fields.Description: Hides in-game decals, cutscene decals are still displayed.

Fields.Name: Cutscene Fade-in Time
Fields.Description: Fade time at the start of cutscene (-1 = system default time). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Cutscene Fade-out Time
Fields.Description: Fade time at the end of cutscene (-1 = system default time). In seconds.
